name: www.core-1.com
message: [AI generated] Core-1 is a California-based company specializing in IT services. They offer an array of services including IT asset disposition (ITAD), data center relocation, server decommissioning, and secure data destruction. The company focuses on optimizing and streamlining clients' IT operations, providing cost-effective, eco-friendly solutions. Core-1 is committed to delivering transparent and efficient strategies to dispose of or recycle obsolete hardware.
